headline: Gold Overtakes US Debt as Top Reserve Asset, De-Dollarization Accelerates
headline_zh: 黄金超越美债成全球最大储备资产，去美元化加速
narrative: Gold has surpassed US Treasury securities as the world's largest official reserve asset, a historic shift reported by Caixin that reflects accelerating de-dollarization among central banks, including China's. The milestone comes as the People's Bank of China continues to add gold to its reserves while reducing its holdings of US debt. Separately, the upcoming trial of former Inner Mongolia chairperson Wang Lixia on corruption charges underscores the Party's ongoing anti-graft campaign, and the Cyberspace Administration announced a new AI cybersecurity testing program. On the corporate front, Chinese consumers are abandoning Nike faster than expected, and Nissan has partnered with Chery for UK production, highlighting the deepening integration of Chinese auto players in global supply chains.
narrative_zh: 黄金已超越美国国债成为全球最大的官方储备资产，财新报道的这一历史性转变反映了包括中国在内的各国央行加速去美元化。此时中国人民银行继续增持黄金，同时减持美债。此外，内蒙古自治区原主席王莉霞因腐败受审即将开庭，凸显党的持续反腐行动；网信办宣布启动人工智能赋能网络安全测试。企业方面，中国消费者抛弃耐克的速度快于预期，日产与奇瑞达成英国生产合作，显示中国汽车企业深度融入全球供应链。
